string.text: Bribe guards to view latest reports ({BRIBE_AMOUNT}{GOLD_ICON})
You have arrived to {SETTLEMENT_LINK}. You see the guards keep an eye for any danger around your town {BOUND_SETTLEMENT}
You have arrived to {SETTLEMENT_LINK}. You see the guards keep an eye for any danger around the town {BOUND_SETTLEMENT} which governed by {LORD.LINK}, {FACTION_OFFICIAL} of the {FACTION_TERM}
The guards say that they can't just let anyone read these reports.
You cannot view reports of an enemy watchtower.
You cannot wait in an enemy watchtower.
• {TIME} - {NAME} is leading {TYPE} of {TROOPS} troops. They are {BEHAVIOR} Prisoner count: {PRISONERS}.
